title: cissampelos pareira var. macrostachya
intro: Cissampelos pareira var. macrostachya, also known as Makoi in Ayurvedic medicine, is a plant species belonging to the Cissampelos genus, native to the tropical forests of Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its diuretic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Cissampelos pareira var. macrostachya include its ability to aid in the treatment of kidney stones, urinary tract infections, and other renal disorders. The plant is commonly used in herbal preparations, such as decoctions and infusions, to support kidney health and alleviate symptoms associated with kidney disease.
